diary_entries.entry: Year 86 on Mars. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. Morale is hopeful. We have 277 food units left.
The aurora changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.
Year 86 on Mars. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. Morale is hopeful. We have 277 food units left.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 86): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
